MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Gordon Jong is present.
Attorney, Joseph Sacramento, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Asmariady Syamsu, is present.
Attorney, Eric Lunsford, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tony Schoenberg, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-01-2010 is vacated.
